data.title: GitHub Copilot enhances AI coding with custom instructions, reusable prompts, and specialized agents for better output.
data.description: GitHub released a report outlining three effective strategies for developers to enhance AI coding results. These methods include utilizing custom instructions, creating reusable prompts, and employing specialized agents. These techniques aim to improve the efficiency and accuracy of AI programming.

data.title: TruuCONNECT NJ offers users anonymous access to local resources, partnership between NJ CRC and Health Department. Expands digital hub.
data.description: In Mount Laurel, New Jersey, on January 12, 2026, the launch of TruuCONNECT NJ was announced to be an outcome of the collaboration between the New Jersey Community Resource Center (NJ CRC) and the New Jersey Department of Health and Human Services. This digital hub, the first of its kind, has been enhanced to facilitate connections and streamline services.

data.title: CES 2026 highlights ZWHAND's revolutionary robotic hands for mass Embodied AI, crucial for human-robot interaction.
data.description: At a tech event in Las Vegas on January 12, 2026, CES 2026 kicked off with a strong emphasis on the commercialization of embodied AI. The event highlighted the significance of dexterous hands in human-robot interaction after the successful mass production introduction of humanoid robots in 2025. This development underscores the crucial role these hands play in enhancing the real-world value of robots.

data.title: SA&M promotes 4 new Partners - Jared Brenner, Cathleen Green, Celina Kirchner, Simon Leefatt, and appoints Peter Saari as CEO.
data.description: In Los Angeles on January 12, 2026, Stubbs Alderton & Markiles, LLP (SA&M) revealed the promotion of five individuals within the company. Jared Brenner, Cathleen Green, Celina Kirchner, and Simon Leefatt have all been promoted to Partner, while Peter Saari has been appointed as the new CEO. These advancements highlight the Firm's commitment to recognizing talent and promoting from within.

data.title: Oracle introduces AI tool for retailers at NRF 2026; Retail Supply Chain Collaboration cloud solution aids in managing supplier risks with AI insights.
data.description: Oracle has introduced a new Retail Supply Chain Collaboration cloud solution that utilizes artificial intelligence to offer insights to retailers. This solution aims to assist retailers in effectively managing supplier risks and compliance issues. The advanced technology included in the cloud solution facilitates efficient decision-making and enhances collaboration within the supply chain.Oracle's Retail Supply Chain Collaboration cloud solution presents a proactive approach to handling potential risks and ensuring adherence to regulatory requirements. By leveraging AI-driven insights, retailers can streamline their processes and mitigate supply chain disruptions. This innovative solution is designed to cater to the evolving needs of retailers and promote sustainable practices in the industry.

data.title: Interfor will announce Q4 & fiscal 2025 results on Feb 12, 2026, followed by analyst conference call at 8:00am Pacific on Feb 13, 2026.
data.description: An analyst conference call is scheduled for 8:00 a.m. Pacific Time on Friday, February 13, 2026. Attendees will discuss important market insights and financial data during this conference call.

data.title: Luxury beauty brand Blushington to open first Texas franchise in Houston in Spring 2026.
data.description: Blushington, a renowned luxury beauty service destination, is set to debut its inaugural Texas franchise in Houston in the Spring of 2026.

data.title: Sky Harbour's subsidiary files $100 million bond, 1st draw under J.P. Morgan facility, leasing updates.
data.description: In West Harrison, NY, Sky Harbour Group Corporation (NYSE: SKYH, SKYH WS) disclosed plans as an aviation infrastructure company establishing the initial nationwide network of Home Base Operator (HBO) campuses for business aircraft. The company's indirect, wholly-owned subsidiary, Sky Harbour Capital III LLC, is submitting a preliminary filing today to the Municipal Securities Rulemaking Board using the Electronic Municipal Market Access system (EMMA).

data.title: Dynex Capital declares $0.17 monthly common stock dividend for January 2026, payable on Feb 2, 2026.
data.description: In Glen Allen, Virginia, Dynex Capital, Inc. (NYSE: DX) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a cash dividend of $0.17 per common share for January 2026. The dividend will be disbursed on February 2, 2026, to shareholders recorded by January 21, 2026. Dynex Capital specializes in the convergence of capital markets and the U.S. housing finance sector, leveraging its knowledge to convert residential real estate into attractive long-term returns.

data.title: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth visited Lockheed Martin F-35 facility in Fort Worth on Jan 12, 2026. #LMT #F35
data.description: Lockheed Martin hosted Secretary of War Pete Hegseth at their F-35 Lightning II production facility in Fort Worth, Texas on January 12, 2026. The visit was part of the secretary's Arsenal of Freedom industry tour. Lockheed Martin is listed on the New York Stock Exchange as LMT.

data.title: JPM stock slides, available in a buy zone. Trump looks to cap credit card interest rates, with JPMorgan reporting earnings Tuesday.
data.description: Shares of JPMorgan (JPM) declined within a favorable buying range as President Donald Trump proposed to limit credit card interest rates. JPMorgan is set to announce its earnings on Tuesday. Additionally, two leading banks exhibit positive chart patterns leading up to the launch of Q4.
